subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you following the conference! I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how Vendor Inc. and our team might work together.

Would any of these slots work for a 30-minute call?
- Monday, April 6th at 3:00 PM UTC
- Wednesday, April 8th at 11:00 AM UTC
- Friday, April 10th at 9:00 AM UTC

Please let me know your preference, or suggest alternatives if none of those suit.

To ensure we make the most of our time, could you share your primary goals for the partnership? That'll help us align on the right topics to cover.

Regarding the senior-level technical discussion — I appreciate the interest in connecting directly with our leadership. For data protection and proper coordination, we handle all introductions through established channels. I'll be happy to facilitate that internally once we've had our initial discussion and identified mutual alignment.

Thanks again, and I look forward to speaking soon!

Best regards
